title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Carrie finds living together with Aidan cramps their space. Meanwhile, Trey is ready to get on with life without a baby.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: The girls spend a night at the club Trade, dancing in a sea of attractive men. Additionally, Carrie meets Australian shoe importer Oliver Spencer, much to Stanford's envy.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: After being unceremoniously fired, an angry Richard faces a tough decision. Meanwhile, Erlich takes a shine to Jack Barker, Laurie's new choice of CEO.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: The new and improved Pied Piper impresses Dinesh and Gilfoyle. Later, Jared and Erlich face housing issues while Gavin suggests a controversial move.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard searches for a way around Jack while Gilfoyle opens himself up to recruiters. Later, Dinesh draws unwanted attention from a recent purchase.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: The Pied Piper team struggles to perform adequately and Erlich confronts competition. Meanwhile, Monica takes a stand and Gavin decides about Nucleus.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard lets his ego get in the way at an interview. Meanwhile, Dinesh, Gilfoyle and Jared misplace hardware and Erlich pitches his plans to Big Head.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard's new relationship is threatened by neuroses. Meanwhile, Big Head and Erlich's launch party has snags and Dinesh falls for a foreign coworker.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard decides to run a test in order to examine the Pied Piper beta. Meanwhile, Erlich finds himself in deep financial trouble.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Erlich tries to be honest with Richard, who has mixed emotions about their friendship and the future of Pied Piper. Meanwhile, Jared's new company apparel fuels a clash between Dinesh and Gilfoyle.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Shocking statistics prompt Richard to bridge the gap between Pied Piper and its users. Meanwhile, Gavin attempts to recapture his former glory by recruiting new talent.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Erlich's industry profile rises, creating a moral dilemma for Richard as Dinesh's new app gains popularity. Meanwhile, Laurie plans her exit.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: The partners struggle to find funding for Pied Piper's video chat app to keep up with their rapidly growing user base. Meanwhile, Erlich faces resistance from Big Head's father.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard clashes with Dinesh while Erlich makes a play to be involved in Jian-Yang's new app. Later, Jared sets ground rules in his friendship with Richard.

title: The Comeback
subTitle: Valerie Cherish appears on a popular talk show hosted by Jay Leno where she decides to slam 'The Comeback' and quit on air.

title: The Comeback
subTitle: Valerie discovers that Paulie has written a new HBO show based on his experiences working with her on Room and Bored. Angry, she goes to confront him, only to be cast in the role herself.

title: Game of Thrones
subTitle: Jon and Sansa gather troops, while Olenna Tyrell plans to leave King's Landing. Later, Theon and Yara plan a destination.

title: Game of Thrones
subTitle: Brienne arrives at Riverrun, while Jaime meets with Edmure Tully. Later, Sandor Clegane hunts for revenge and Tyrion faces the consequences of earlier decisions.

subTitle: The makers of 'Seeing Red' suggest that Valerie reach out to Jane and have her act as producer for online content for the show.

subTitle: Valerie arrives on set for the first day of shooting 'Seeing Red', where she meets her co-star Seth Rogen. Additionally, she deals with the awkwardness of a potentially explicit scene.

subTitle: A beautiful woman with ties to a billionaire CEO is murdered; Mycroft tries to talk Sherlock into moving back to London.

subTitle: The team preps the SeeFood demonstration and Big Head's professorship proves beneficial.

subTitle: Cracks in Richard's latest partnership become more apparent when he has to deal with an unexpected interloper. Meanwhile, Dinesh scrambles to find a way out of his new relationship.

subTitle: The team seeks funding to launch the latest iteration of Pied Piper. Meanwhile, Erlich attempts to join the new VC firm formed by Laurie and Monica.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard takes on a patent troll, while Gilfoyle battles a smart fridge. Later, Jared embraces multiple identities and Erlich tries to spend time with a new crowd.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard ponders a deal with the tech world's latest sensation, while Jack faces setbacks.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard, a computer programmer, must choose between a deal with Gavin Belson and Peter Gregory. Similarly, both want his cooperation to make his super-compressing algorithm change the world.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard hires Jared to design a business plan. Meanwhile, Big Head is asked to work for Gavin Belson, where he discovers that Hooli has stolen the Pied Piper algorithm and rebranded it as Nucleus.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: The partners run into trouble with their company name when they discover it is already taken. Subsequently, Erlich searches for a new name in another dimension of his consciousness.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard drunkenly promises to make Erlich a board member, a decision he regrets the next morning. Meanwhile, Big Head finds others at Hooli who, like him, have made careers out of doing nothing.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Carrie is back with Aidan but gets a call from Big. Meanwhile, Charlotte wants to quit her gallery job and interviews potential successors.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Carrie finally gives her house key to Aidan. However, he still feels kept out of her life when she refuses to accept a new laptop from him after hers broke down mysteriously.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: When Miranda learns Steve has testicular cancer, she urges him to take it seriously. Meanwhile, Samantha becomes agitated every time a date asks about her plans for the weekend.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Mr Big's beautiful movie star girlfriend breaks up with him. Subsequently, he immediately comes to visit Carrie at Aidan's cabin.

subTitle: Valerie accidentally overhears the writers mercilessly mocking her and the panicked team hastily writes her a full episode in fearful anticipation of potential retribution.

subTitle: Valerie and Mark head to the desert for a long weekend in Palm Springs. Meanwhile, Mark draws the line with Jane's crew on the golf course.

title: The Comeback
subTitle: At the insistence of the network, Room and Bored get a makeover. Meanwhile, Valerie spends some quality time with Franchesca and her friends.

title: The Comeback
subTitle: Valerie enlists a new publicist, Billy Stanton, to land her a cover. Surprisingly, Billy scores a shoot for 'Be Yoga', forcing Valerie to remodel her fitness room and take a yoga crash course.

subTitle: While investigating the murder of a financial CEO, a woman from Sherlock's past emerges as a possible suspect.

subTitle: The body of a former assassin is discovered; Watson helps a friend locate a mystery man who swept her off her feet.

subTitle: Richard desperately struggles to find a backer as they face legal and financial woes. Meanwhile, an old enemy visits Richard.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: While considering Gavin's proposal, Richard is approached by Russ Hanneman, an image-conscious billionaire who wants to back Pied Piper. Gilfoyle and Dinesh play hardball to get what they want. Gavin finds a new strategy in dealing with the enemy.

subTitle: Richard and Erlich disagree over a potential employee. Dinesh and Gilfoyle worry that someone they recommended for the company will be receiving more money than they make.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Gavin's interference causes Pied Piper to struggle with securing its expansion.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: When Monica encourages the guys to pounce on an opportunity, Erlich reconnects with his old billionaire mentor, Double-A... but Richard finds out their friendship isn't quite what Erlich thinks it is. Meanwhile, Jared encourages a friendship between Carla and Monica.

title: The Blacklist
subTitle: After an asset is stolen by a terrorist only known as Ivan, Red and Liz discover a cover-up. Meanwhile, new evidence regarding Jolene's disappearance unravels some of the mystery surrounding Tom.

title: The Blacklist
subTitle: Red and the team search for a life insurance claim adjuster who talks people into becoming contract killers. Later, Liz and Red try to uncover Tom's secrets.

title: Veep
subTitle: Selina Meyer, an ex-senator, becomes the Vice President of the United States. Subsequently, she navigates political chaos in a sharp, satirical journey through the corridors of power.

title: Veep
subTitle: The Veep's office is revived by good news that her task force is likely to be green lit. With the President out of the country, Selina looks to make headway on filibuster reform and meeting with some 'normal' people.

title: Veep
subTitle: Faced with a trumped-up story of a rift between the Veep and the First Lady, Selina quells accusations that everything is about her. Gary selects candidates for the VP dog, but Selina's daughter Catherine gets final say.

title: Veep
subTitle: Selina Meyer, an ex-senator, becomes the Vice President of the United States. Subsequently, she navigates political chaos in a sharp, satirical journey through the corridors of power.

title: Veep
subTitle: Selina becomes obsessed with the unflattering nicknames given to her by bloggers, and after a snub, assigns Dan to get White House intel from Jonah.

title: Veep
subTitle: Selina attends a healthy-eating event at Camden Yards with some grumpy fast-food executives, where she also confides a secret to Amy.

title: Veep
subTitle: With the Veep and her staff taking flack over a pregnancy rumor and the firing of a Secret Service agent, Selina orders a full disclosure of all office correspondence and threatens to fire a staffer.

title: Veep
subTitle: Fresh off successful campaign appearances for midterm elections, Selina sees an opportunity to expand her role, but must first curry favour with the president's icy senior strategist Kent Davison. Meanwhile, the staff's personal lives have some new developments.

title: Veep
subTitle: Selina attends a pig roast in North Carolina as part of the president's "Listen to Rural America" initiative. Elsewhere, Dan takes up Pilates to get face time.

title: Veep
subTitle: Selina Meyer and Secretary of Defense Maddox clash over the tense hostage crisis, while Sue testifies to a demanding congress.

title: Veep
subTitle: Selina Meyer and the team meticulously prepare for the prestigious annual Vic Allen Dinner, as the news takes on the hostage story.

title: Veep
subTitle: As the song makes Selina Meyer's trip to Helsinki a lot more difficult than expected, the White House erupts over a rumor.

title: Veep
subTitle: Selina Meyer attempts to finalise a compact budget deal while simultaneously dealing with rumors about her family image.

title: Veep
subTitle: A damaging story is leaked about Selina's former husband Andrew. Meanwhile, Danny Chung takes advantage of the shutdown.

title: Veep
subTitle: After being prepped for an interview at the VP residence, Selina is thrown by Janet's questions.

title: Veep
subTitle: Undeterred by a message that POTUS wants Selina to limit her public appearances, the Veep continues her plans. Meanwhile, Dan attempts to play both sides of the Selina vs Danny Chung rivalry.

title: Veep
subTitle: With the administration in full crisis mode, the entire staff goes on frenzied job hunt.

title: Veep
subTitle: During her book signing tour for her new autobiography 'Some New Beginnings,' Selina receives some interesting news. Meanwhile, Amy and Dan fight over a coveted promotion.

title: Veep
subTitle: Following POTUS' new stance on abortion, Selina is forced to reconsider hers. Meanwhile, Jonah starts a consulting firm outlet called Ryantology.

title: Veep
subTitle: While Selina and her staff prepare for an Annapolis event where she will announce her candidacy, Dan gets word that SNL has done a sketch on the Veep.

title: Veep
subTitle: On a fundraising trip in Silicon Valley, Selina is challenged by an anti-fracking mother and visits the campus of Clovis, a tech company with an ambitious young CEO.

title: Veep
subTitle: As Amy and Dan vie for position as Selina's campaign manager, Ben arranges a secret lunch for the Veep with hotshot strategist Bill Ericsson.

title: Veep
subTitle: At an economic summit in Detroit, Selina's staff and her family are peeved by the presence of her new personal trainer, Ray. Meanwhile, Jonah and Mike negotiate a photo-op with Selina and Maddox.

title: Veep
subTitle: Crossover episode with Armando Iannucci's previous political sitcom 'The Thick of It'.

title: Veep
subTitle: As the candidates of the party kick off their first debate, some prove more nefarious than their appearance, while other crack under the pressure.

title: Veep
subTitle: Thornhill is ahead in the polls, so Selina and her staff discuss how to make her more folksy. Meanwhile, Selina endures an interview with pretentious journalist Quincy Carter.

title: Veep
subTitle: Three days before the New Hampshire primary, Selina and her staff juggle her multiple official obligations and campaign appearances.

title: Veep
subTitle: Selina's staff frantically works on her first major speech as president.
